Space Mountain.description: A classic, space-themed indoor roller coaster that takes riders on a thrilling journey through outer space in near-complete darkness.

Jurassic World VelociCoaster.description: An intense, high-speed steel launch coaster that sends riders racing through the raptor paddock, featuring two powerful launches and a series of extreme inversions.

Mako®.description: A high-speed steel hyper coaster known for its deep drops, continuous airtime, and smooth maneuvers, themed after the ocean's fastest shark.

Iron Gwazi.description: A record-breaking hybrid wood-and-steel roller coaster featuring a 91-degree, beyond-vertical drop, multiple inversions, and intense airtime elements.

The Twilight Zone Tower of Terror.description: A highly immersive drop-tower attraction themed around the classic television show, where riders plunge down a haunted 1930s hotel elevator shaft.
The Twilight Zone Tower of Terror.manufacturer: Otis Elevator Company / Walt Disney Imagineering

Hagrid's Magical Creatures Motorbike Adv.description: A deeply immersive story-coaster that takes riders on a journey through the Forbidden Forest on flying motorbikes, featuring multiple launches and a drop track.
Hagrid's Magical Creatures Motorbike Adv.land: The Wizarding World of Harry Potter - Hogsmeade

Avatar Flight of Passage.description: A state-of-the-art 3D flight simulator attraction that allows guests to fly on a native mountain Banshee over the breathtaking landscape of Pandora.

Kraken®.description: A high-speed, floorless steel roller coaster named after the legendary deep-sea monster, featuring seven intense inversions and subterranean loops.

SheiKra.description: A massive floorless steel dive coaster that takes riders up 200 feet, holds them over a 90-degree cliffhanger drop, and releases them into a vertical plunge.

Guardians of the Galaxy: Cosmic Rewind.description: An innovative indoor storytelling roller coaster featuring a reverse launch and 360-degree rotating vehicles, set to a soundtrack of classic hits.
